rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MAGILAVY FAMILY TRUST ESTABLISHED JUNE 5, 1989 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction, Petition For Orders
rulings.Rulings: The motion for preliminary injunction is denied. All the requested relief fails for one or more of the following reasons: it is not a properly subject of a motion for preliminary injunction, an adequate evidentiary showing of likelihood of success on the merits is not made, the injury to respondent would outweigh any injury to petitioner from awaiting final judgment, the request is too vague or uncertain to be enforced, enforcement would be an improper prior restraint on speech or an improper interference with a party's right to litigate, there is an adequate remedy at law, petitioner has not shown any irreparable injury, or it depends on a positive litigation outcome and fails to protect the status quo. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, December 21, 2106.
